name: legalcode-pro-codex
description: Legalcode authenticated endpoint for Codex with 52 legal skills (50 public + Icelandic gold-plating analysis + DOCX renderer) and CLI install helper.

interface.shortDescription: Authenticated legal research and drafting for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bundle the hosted authenticated Legalcode MCP endpoint with 52 Legalcode skills (50 public skills plus Icelandic gold-plating analysis and a self-contained DOCX renderer) and a CLI install helper for stronger search, guidance, agreements, downloads, and authenticated workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Legalcode to review this contract and identify the main legal risks.
Use Legalcode to analyze the governing statute and explain the compliance implications.
